options.command: command -v uv >/dev/null && uv build || echo 'uv not installed, skipping build (real publish builds in mirror CI)'
command -v uv >/dev/null && uv run --group dev ruff check . || echo 'uv not installed, skipping lint (real lint runs in mirror CI)'
command -v uv >/dev/null && uv run --group dev pytest || echo 'uv not installed, skipping'
